channel.title: Configuration on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Configuration on DevOpsTales

item.title: Kilo Code: Mastering Codebase Indexing for Semantic AI Search
item.description: One of the most powerful features of Kilo Code is its ability to understand your entire codebase semantically—not just through keyword matching, but by grasping the actual meaning and relationships in your code.

item.title: Kilo Code Skills: Extending Agent Capabilities
item.description: In our previous post, we explored Advanced MCP Integration and how to connect your agent to external tools and data. But what if you need specialized expertise for specific tasks?

item.title: Kilo Code: Steering and Custom Agents
item.description: Structure is great, but every team has its own “tribal knowledge”—naming conventions, preferred libraries, and security requirements that aren’t always obvious to a general LLM.

item.title: AI IDE Configuration Standards: From .vscode to AGENTS.md
item.description: As AI tools become more integrated into our development workflows, the way we configure our projects is changing. We’ve moved beyond simple .gitignore and .env files into a world where we need to provide specific “instructions” and “context” to our AI assistants.
